spec_match.rationale: Excellent builder allowing real-time generation and verification of zoom CSS values.

interactive.rationale: Fully interactive controls adjusting sliders, colors, triggers, and selectors with live preview updates.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with authoring and transition configuration milestone parameters.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates multiple triggers (hover, click, keyframe loops) and correctly toggles their styling.

references.rationale: Includes standard crumbs referencing spec links.

design_system.rationale: Strictly adheres to global styling variables and correct button pairing rules.

summary: An outstanding and deeply interactive authoring sandbox allowing developers to design and experiment with various animatable zoom parameters and copy production-ready CSS.
